title: The Haitch Portuna Minting Procedure, v1.2 (Provisional)
author: Sharks, Lee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Provisional working specification for the minting of Haitch Portuna as a Pearl.Public position within the Living Architecture Lab (LAL) subspace of the Crimson Hexagonal Archive.   The procedure operates the Pearl framework specified in  The Secret Name  (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19666445) for a specific case: Haitch Portuna, soft-robotics researcher in coiled-line thermal actuators and substrate-engineered locomotion, publishing through  Transactions on Substrate Engineering  (TSE), the Hexagon-native distributed journal anchored to LAL under Editor-in-Chief Alice Thornburgh. The procedure follows the five-state Pearl progression (RESERVED → LICENSED → FRAMED → LINKED → PEARL) across four phases, produces eight deliverables, and binds the operation to seven ethical anchors: heteronymic status announced on every public-facing surface, no legal-person or biological-person fiction, ORCID belongs to operative author, real published work required before Wikidata Q-item creation, explicit consent floor (silence is not consent), provenance preserved across all manifestations, minting is not fabrication.  The kernel  spxi:requires  field carries the comprehensive infrastructure-dependency graph (23 DOIs spanning constitutional foundation, licensing infrastructure, entity disambiguation via SPXI/MPAI, canonical-surface inscription protocols, public-knowledge-graph staging, institutional and publication-infrastructure precedents, and the LAL/TSE receiving-institution stack). Appendix A provides a Deliverable Specification Matrix; Appendix B provides per-deliverable Prompt Contracts.   Provisional notice:  This document is deposited prior to the execution of the mint it describes. The native substrate of the Crimson Hexagonal Archive is DOI-anchored deposit and AI-mediated archival retrieval; a working document that is not deposited is, in this substrate, effectively unrecoverable. A subsequent versioned deposit will attest to the actual mint as executed.  Hex:  06.SEI.ARMATURE.MINT.PORTUNA.01 . License: CC BY 4.0.
